summary.key_theme: 儘管公司在第 4 季財報中實現營收成長與創紀錄的展店數，但因營收未達市場預期，導致多家投行下調目標價，市場情緒呈現多空拉鋸。

bullish.title: Ollie's Bargain Outlet Holdings Inc (OLLI) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Store Openings
bullish.reason: 公司第 4 季淨銷售額成長 17 %，並創下單季新開 86 家門市的紀錄，展現強勁的市場擴張能力。

bullish.title: Ollie's Bargain Outlet Poised to Capture Market Share After Competitors' Closures, UBS Says
bullish.reason: 瑞銀 (UBS) 指出競爭對手關店將有利於 OLLI 獲取更多市場份額，具備長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Wells Fargo Upgrades Ollie's Bargain Outlet to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $130
bullish.reason: 富國銀行 (Wells Fargo) 將評級上調至「加碼」，反映對其折扣零售模式在當前經濟環境下的信心。

bullish.title: Ollie’s Stock Won’t Stay a Bargain Much Longer
bullish.reason: 市場分析認為公司正處於強勁反彈軌道，股價有望挑戰歷史新高。

bullish.title: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Ollie's Bargain Outlet, Raises Price Target to $155
bullish.reason: RBC Capital 維持「優於大盤」評級並調升目標價至 $155，顯示對其獲利能力的長期看好。

bullish.title: Ollie's (OLLI) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
bullish.reason: 股價在財報發布後一度上漲 4.7 %，反映投資人對展店策略的正面反應。

bullish.title: Why Ollie's Bargain Outlet (OLLI) is a Top Growth Stock for the Long-Term
bullish.reason: Zacks 評級系統將其列為長期成長股，強調其選股模型的強勢表現。

bullish.title: Ollie's Bargain Outlet Forecasts 2026 Growth as Fourth-Quarter Results Increase
bullish.reason: 公司對 2026 財年給出正向獲利與銷售成長指引，為未來營運提供支撐。

bearish.title: Ollie's Bargain Outlet Analysts Slash Their Forecasts After Q4 Results
bearish.reason: 儘管每股盈餘 (EPS) 達 $1.39，但營收 $7.79 億美元未達市場預期，導致分析師下調預測。

bearish.title: Ollie’s Bargain Outlet price target lowered to $135 from $150 at BofA
bearish.reason: 美國銀行 (BofA) 因財報表現不如預期，將目標價大幅下調 $15。

bearish.title: Piper Sandler Reiterates Overweight on Ollie's Bargain Outlet, Lowers Price Target to $128
bearish.reason: Piper Sandler 維持評級但下調目標價，反映對短期成長動能的擔憂。

bearish.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Ollie's Bargain Outlet, Lowers Price Target to $120
bearish.reason: 摩根士丹利 (Morgan Stanley) 下調目標價至 $120，維持中立評級。

bearish.title: Ollie’s Bargain Outlet price target lowered to $135 from $142 at Truist
bearish.reason: Truist 將目標價下調 $7，顯示市場對其短期股價表現的修正。

bearish.title: OLLI Q4 Deep Dive: Store Growth, Merchandise Expansion, and Value Focus Drive Results
bearish.reason: 深入分析指出營收未達標是主要隱憂，儘管展店策略正確，但成長速度受限。

bearish.title: How Tiny Valuation Tweaks Are Shaping The Story For Ollie's Bargain Outlet (OLLI)
bearish.reason: 分析師對公司公允價值模型進行微調，顯示市場對其估值溢價的重新審視。

neutral.title: Ollie's Bargain Outlet Q4 Seen as Modest Net Positive, Unlikely to Shift Investor Views, RBC Says
neutral.reason: RBC 認為財報僅為「溫和正面」，不足以改變投資人對該股的整體觀點。

neutral.title: Ollie's (OLLI) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
neutral.reason: 財報電話會議逐字稿，提供公司營運細節，屬資訊揭露性質。

neutral.title: Company News for Mar 13, 2026
neutral.reason: 僅為當日市場新聞彙整，提及 OLLI 但無具體分析。

neutral.title: Stronger Earnings, Record Openings and 2026 Guidance Might Change The Case For Investing In Ollie's (OLLI)
neutral.reason: 綜合報導財報與未來展望，未有明確多空偏向，屬回顧性質。

neutral.title: Ollie's Bargain Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Comps Rise 3.6% Y/Y
neutral.reason: 報導財報數據，雖提及 EPS 優於預期，但營收略低，整體呈現中性報導。
